chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P.NO.S-02 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For katcha peshi. 18.09.2017 None present for the petitioners. Mr. Ghulam Shabbir Zardari, Assistant A.G = Nobody is in attendance on behalf of the petitioners. However, since the life and liberty of the petitioners is involved in this petition, therefore, in the interest of justice this matter is taken up. From the record, it appears that the official respondents have filed their comments in the matter, whereas, in the comments the official respondents have categorically denied the allegations leveled against them by the petitioners in this petition. The main grievance of the petitioners is that they have contracted marriage with each other according to Shariah but the official respondents are not providing protection to them against the highhandedness of the private respondents. In the interest of justice, this matter is being disposed of with the direction to the private respondents not to cause any harassment to the petitioners, whereas, the official respondents are directed to provide legal protection to the petitioners in the event they approach them but strictly in accordance with law. JUDGE Shahid
